programmes.show_description: They survived the Australian jungle or the Welsh castle, but now the most memorable campmates from I'm A Celebrity... return to South Africa and battle to become a Legend.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Documentary series. It's scanning time on the farm! After a tricky tupping season, the family find out whether the three male tups have earned their keep and got the ewes in lamb.
News, current affairs and lively debate.
Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.
The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Brian Conley, Sue Perkins, and Colin Salmon all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
David Dickinson pitches up in Burton with his team of Henry Nicholls, Stewart Hofgartner, Tim Hogarth and Mark Stevens.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as one of his brave contestants dares to face the infamous Banker for a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.
Bradley Walsh hosts as Richard from Bradford, Grace from Portsmouth, Gordon originally from West Lothian and Eleanor from Broadstairs come together to take on a Chaser as a team.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of the Labour Party.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.
The Walshes reach Osaka as they explore the city in go-karts, learn how to become ninjas, and have a go at the quirky yet growing Japanese sport of pillow fighting.
Cain is in an accident. Jacob is left humiliated. Kerry confides in Jai.
Debbie makes her presence felt at the hotel, Sam accuses Will of intimidation, Ben refuses to give Maggie the time of day, and Tim summons the courage to face Trisha.
In the second instalment of the series, the campmates are in split camps which causes drama, and two new celebrities join them in either the main camp or Savannah Scrub.
ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Lee Mack hosts a spin-off of the quiz where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes as 100 contestants try to win a prize pot of anything up to 500,000 pounds.
Teleshopping.
In the second instalment of the series, the campmates are in split camps which causes drama, and two new celebrities join them in either the main camp or Savannah Scrub.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Reality game show where celebrities cause chaos to win money for unsuspecting contestants of totally fake TV shows! Olivia Attwood joins as this week's rebellious Guest Saboteur.
News, current affairs and lively debate.
Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.
The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Alexander Armstrong, Natasha Hamilton, and Jamie Laing trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
David Dickinson is in Wolverhampton with dealers Karen Dalmeny, James Layte, Mark Stevens and Fay Rutter.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as one of his brave contestants faces the infamous Banker and tries to open those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

Bradley Walsh hosts as four strangers - Christopher from Belfast, Fenella from Brighton, Shane originally from Grimsby and Elizabeth from Surrey - come together in the hope that they can take on a Chaser as a team and leave with thousands of pounds.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
...Conservative Party. A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of the Conservative Party.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.
Adil Ray hosts the game of words as journalist Cathy Newman and wordsmith Gyles Brandreth compete against Loose Women's Kaye Adams and Morning Live's Dr Ranj Singh for charity.
Kyle finds Cain unconscious. Kerry starts to suspect. Moira is concerned.
Summer challenges Debbie's version of how Billy died, Will denies Sam's allegation that he's still seeing Megan, and Lisa and Carla leave Jodie in charge of Connie.
As the campmates battle it out to become a Legend, discover who won the first eating trial and which camp they end up in. Later, two campmates face a bone-chilling trial.
Sir Stephen Fry faces the grilling of a lifetime from neurodivergent interviewers. Did he take drugs in Buckingham Palace? Is he happy to be alive? No question is off the table.
ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Lee Mack hosts the spin-off of the quiz where the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts as 100 contestants try to earn a chance to win anything up to 500,000 pounds.
